_help.channelName: Your channel/brand name shown big in the outro. Leave empty ("") to hide.
_help.subscribeText: Text inside the gradient pill button. e.g. 'Subscribe ▸', 'Follow Me', 'Join Now'.
_help.ctaLine: Line shown below the button. Empty = uses the narration's last line instead.
_help.handles: Array of social handles shown as pills, e.g. ['@yourchannel', '@yourtwitter']. Empty array hides this row.
_help.showSubscribeButton: true/false — show the gradient subscribe pill.
_help.outroEnabled: true/false — render an outro scene at all. If false, outro scenes become explanation scenes.
